hibernate-mapping.sql-query: with src as ( select assignment_id, assignment_number, person_id, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = hp_assignments_d.person_id) as person_name, billing_organisation_id, (select organisation_name from hp_organisation_d where organisation_id = hp_assignments_d.billing_organisation_id) as billing_organisation_name, eu_organisation_id, (select organisation_name from hp_organisation_d where organisation_id = hp_assignments_d.eu_organisation_id) as eu_organisation_name, asg_active, to_char(assignment_start_date, '${dateFormat}') as assignment_start_date, to_char(assignment_end_date, '${dateFormat}') as assignment_end_date, billing_code, billing_code_id, pay_method_id, (select name from hp_payment_methods where pay_method_id = hp_assignments_d.pay_method_id) as payment_method, preferred, decode(wc_org_code_rate_link_id, null, 'N', 'Y') as has_wc, (select decode(nvl(count(*), 0), null, 'N', 0, 'N', 'Y') from prt_assignment_setup where assignment_id = hp_assignments_d.assignment_id) as has_prt, working_state, (select to_char(max(invoice_date), '${dateFormat}') from hp_invoice where source = 'ASSIGNMENT' and source_id = hp_assignments_d.assignment_id ) as last_invoice_date, (select to_char(max(date_earned), '${dateFormat}') from hp_balance where assignment_id = hp_assignments_d.assignment_id ) as last_paid_date from hp_assignments_d ) select * from src where 1 = 1 ${auto_fill} ${where_clause} ${order_by_clause}
